description: CompositionPurple and pink jacket made of 100% polyester with a mesh inner in 100% polyester, has a ribbed neck, cuffs and hem in 95% polyester and 5% elastane, long sleeves, zippered front, zippered waist pockets and embroidered brand logo on the left chestFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 5'8"; Chest: 32"
